results.title: Sunraysia’s finest shine
results.description: AFTER a month of celebrating performing arts in Sunraysia, the Mildura Eisteddfod closed with a gala concert at Mildura Arts Centre on Friday, 26 June. The Eisteddfod, which is in its 47th year, is only getting bigger and better, with participants from schools and local singers, dancers, musicians, and actors. While not all performances could [...]
